    This is still very fragmented. I'll try to group consecutive segments of the same size if they are close in time, but the prompt says "Start a new segment each time the logo enters the frame and close it when it exits." This implies I should be quite granular. However, "Very brief occlusions do not require a new segment." The cuts between wide and close-up are not occlusions, they are camera cuts. So I should treat them as separate segments if the size changes significantly.

    Let's refine the list to be more concise but accurate to the size changes.
